attacking_style: Versatile opportunist who strikes late in technical finales or executes sustained solo chases. Comfortable attacking in final kilometers with technical corners or uphill gradients up to 9%.
team_tactics: Deployed as high-value domestique for GC protection, capable of solo bridge efforts and sprint lead-outs. Takes responsibility for neutralizing dangerous moves through individual firepower rather than team tempo.
terrain_preference: Technical finales with criterium-style corners, uphill sprint gradients (9%), and headwind finishes where power-to-weight advantages apply. Shows unexpected GC-level climbing strength in stage race contexts.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest potential weakness in pure sprint positioning battles. Role as domestique may limit opportunities to showcase full capabilities in controlled bunch finishes.
key_patterns: Late-race breakaway attempts in technical finales, forcing teams to chase deep (2 observations)
Solo chase/bridge efforts covering significant gaps to protect teammates or disrupt races (2 observations)
Versatile tactical deployment: sprint lead-outs on gradients and GC protection duties (3 observations)
Strong individual firepower in headwind/power-based scenarios, neutralizing solo attackers (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: All three observations from 2022 show proactive, high-quality interventions including GC-level climbing and technical handling confidence
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 21
